outlets.name: CNN
outlets.headline: Iran confirms security leader Ali Larijani killed as Trump says he's 'not afraid' of boots on ground
outlets.summary: CNN lead coverage of Trump's boots-on-ground signal, Larijani confirmation, and USS Ford heading to Crete after fire.

outlets.name: NBC News
outlets.headline: 'Already won' or 'got to finish the job': The Trump administration's mixed messages on Iran
outlets.summary: NBC highlights contradictory messaging from Trump cycling between declaring victory and escalating the war.

outlets.name: NPR
outlets.headline: USS Ford has seen war, fire and plumbing woes as it nears a record long deployment
outlets.summary: NPR reports on the Ford's fire, 600 displaced sailors, morale issues, and approaching the all-time Navy deployment record.

outlets.name: PBS
outlets.headline: Republicans resist calls for Iran war hearings, creating standoff with Democrats
outlets.summary: PBS reports on Congressional Democrats threatening daily war powers votes unless hearings are scheduled.

outlets.name: Fox News
outlets.headline: Top EU official wants Iran war to end in situation where 'everybody saves face'
outlets.summary: Fox covers Kallas's diplomatic push for face-saving exit, alongside Trump's 'not afraid' of boots on ground remarks.

outlets.name: Townhall
outlets.headline: Trump Set the Record Straight on Iran Threat After Losing Top Intel Chief
outlets.summary: Townhall frames Kent resignation as weakness, supports Trump's characterization.

outlets.name: NY Post
outlets.headline: Iran deploys Soleimani-named missile as war enters 3rd week
outlets.summary: Coverage of Iran's Haj Qasem missile debut and ongoing missile attacks on Israel.

outlets.name: Daily Wire
outlets.headline: Israel expands Lebanon ground offensive as Hezbollah rockets hit Nahariya
outlets.summary: Focus on IDF 36th Division pushing deeper into southern Lebanon.

outlets.name: Al Jazeera
outlets.headline: Could the Iran war trigger a global recession?
outlets.summary: Al Jazeera Counting the Cost examines whether the war could trigger a global recession as energy prices surge and supply chains fracture.

outlets.name: Euronews
outlets.headline: Leaving NATO is 'something to think about,' Trump says after allies refuse to secure Hormuz
outlets.summary: European perspective on Trump's NATO threat after allies refuse Hormuz mission.

outlets.name: Reuters
outlets.headline: EU foreign policy chief Kallas calls on US, Israel to end Iran war
outlets.summary: Reuters exclusive: Kallas says EU consulting Gulf states on face-saving exit, proposes Hormuz oil corridor modeled on Black Sea grain deal.

outlets.name: HRW
outlets.headline: Iran: Unlawful strikes across Gulf endanger civilians
outlets.summary: Human Rights Watch documents at least 11 civilian deaths and 268 injuries from Iranian strikes across Gulf states.

outlets.name: Times of Israel
outlets.headline: IDF spokesman vows to hunt down Iran's new supreme leader
outlets.summary: IDF signals Mojtaba Khamenei is a target. Also covers Netanyahu urging Iranians to celebrate Chaharshanbe Suri as anti-regime protest.

outlets.name: Haaretz
outlets.headline: A War Will Only Backfire: Israel's Once-in-a-Generation Opportunity in Lebanon
outlets.summary: Haaretz analysis argues that Lebanon ground invasion risks strategic backlash despite initial opportunity.

outlets.name: Jerusalem Post
outlets.headline: Hezbollah monitors as Israel's ground invasion of southern Lebanon expands
outlets.summary: JPost coverage of 36th Division expanding buffer zone as Hezbollah rockets continue into northern Israel.

outlets.name: i24NEWS
outlets.headline: Missile fragments found at Jerusalem holy sites after Iranian barrage
outlets.summary: Coverage of debris at Temple Mount, Holy Sepulchre, and Armenian Quarter.

outlets.name: PressTV
outlets.headline: Iran braces for Chaharshanbe Suri as authorities warn of crackdown
outlets.summary: State media frames fire festival as potential flashpoint. Police commander Radan urges regime supporters to fill squares. Government sends mass texts warning of punishment.

outlets.name: Tehran Times
outlets.headline: Haj Qasem missile debut shows Iran's missile deterrent remains intact
outlets.summary: Iranian media highlights first combat use of advanced Haj Qasem missile as proof of undiminished capability.

outlets.name: IRNA
outlets.headline: Iran FM denies contact with US envoy — 'claims geared to mislead oil traders'
outlets.summary: Araghchi publicly denies back-channel talks with Witkoff despite Axios report confirming contact.

outlets.name: Tasnim
outlets.headline: IRGC vows crushing response for martyrdom of Larijani and military commanders
outlets.summary: IRGC promises massive retaliation for the killing of Larijani and Basij force commander.
